member_group_control.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

member_status_code.text: ประเภทสมาชิก

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control)as coltrol_name , sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance)as share_balance , sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_installment)as share_installment from sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance >0 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date = to_date('16/09/2025','dd/mm/yyyy') --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no = '056043'
group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control
